name: ExtensionEvidenceVariable_Characteristic_TimeFromEvent
title: R5: Timing in which the characteristic is determined
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4B: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromStart` 0..1 `BackboneElement`
*  R4: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromStart` 0..1 `Duration`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromStart` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
